scope: Run the first expanded manual discovery batch through the hybrid MiroFish harness

problem.summary: The repo had only a tiny starter discovery example. It still needed a broader batch that could reveal which newly discovered operator domains survive intake, benchmark comparison, and the hybrid simulation harness.
problem.decision: Add an expanded manual discovery batch, canonicalize it, generate a hybrid spec, run the corrected harness, and save a research note with the resulting domain cluster read.

deliverables.purpose: Stores the first expanded manual discovery intake with real candidates, duplicates, noise, and benchmark overlap.
Stores the canonicalized expanded discovery packet.
Stores the hybrid evaluation spec built from the expanded accepted set.
Stores the end-to-end hybrid run for the expanded batch.
Summarizes what the expanded batch revealed about promising discovered domains.

verification_plan: Run chip-labs mirofish-discovery-batch on the expanded raw batch
Run chip-labs mirofish-hybrid-spec on the expanded canonical packet
Run chip-labs mirofish-hybrid-run on the saved expanded spec
Inspect the discovered-only leaderboard in the ensemble output
